feedback: PRD authored for REQ-000055 covering live end-to-end operation of the autonomous-dev-homelab plugin. Sections: problem statement, goals/non-goals, stakeholders, 19 user stories, 10 grouped FR sets with testable acceptance criteria, live-environment table for gallifrey-lab-01/02 and unraid.pwatson.space, 9 NFRs, constraints, success metrics, risks (including breaking-change and cross-team dependency flags), 7 open questions, and full US<->FR traceability. Safety model (L0 default, typed-CONFIRM, 24h delay) preserved and explicitly out of scope for weakening. No code, no tech choices beyond those already fixed by the request (Vault, MCP-first w/ SSH fallback, TypeScript build).

artifacts.title: PRD: REQ-000055 — Make autonomous-dev-homelab Operate Patrick's Live Homelab End-to-End
